channel.title: +Phenotype on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Phenotype on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Intelligence
item.description: savarNas USA Immigrant Group N Sample proportion Group diff d Full Scale IQ estimate Europe 119 12.3% 0.04 99.1 Northeast Asia 56 5.8% 0.26 105.8 Southeast Asia 96 9.9% 0.21 104.4 South Asia (India) 72 7.4% 0.46 111.9 Sub-Saharan Africa 54 5.6% -0.30 89.0 Mexico 106 10.9% -0.52 82.4 Central America/ Caribbean 96 9.9% -0.51 82.6 South America 41 4.2% -0.39 86.3 All 971 100.0% -0.16 93.3 Notes: Each group difference is the immigrant mean minus the native mean.
